visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, dark, wavy hair is shown in a static close-up shot. She is wearing a blue and gold patterned qipao-style top and a sheer white shawl. She looks directly into the lens, smiling broadly while tilting her head slightly to the side. The lighting is bright and soft against a plain wall. (2) The subject continues to face the camera, her facial expressions subtly shifting as she speaks. Her mouth movements are clear, and her eyes maintain a friendly, engaging gaze. The background remains a consistent light-colored indoor wall, with no other objects or people visible in the frame. The camera is steady throughout. (3) The woman remains in the same position, finishing her message with an even wider smile. Her head movements are slight and natural, complementing her speech. No physical text overlays other than subtitles are present. The composition stays centered on her face and upper torso, highlighting her traditional attire and expressive demeanor.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: Uncle Auntie 好. (2) [Subtitle]: 我是你儿子的女朋友. (3) [Subtitle]: 淑芬. (4) [Subtitle]: 今年的过年我有做工. (5) [Subtitle]: 所以没有办法. (6) [Subtitle]: 陪他回去看你们哦~. (7) [Subtitle]: 祝你们新年快乐. (8) [Subtitle]: 万事如意. (9) [Subtitle]: 身体健康. (10) [Subtitle]: 恭喜发财.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long dark wavy hair, wearing a traditional-style blue and gold qipao top and a white outer garment.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, off-white interior wall with no visible decorations or objects, suggesting a minimalist or domestic setting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear, female voice begins with a bright, energetic greeting in a mix of English and Mandarin: 'Hello, Uncle Auntie.' The tone is extremely friendly, with a relatively high pitch and enthusiastic prosody. There is no background music or significant ambient interference, creating a very clean signal-to-noise ratio. (2) The speaker continues in Mandarin, introducing herself as 'Shufen,' identifying as the girlfriend of the listener's son. The voice maintains a high emotional valence, sounding polite and slightly apologetic as she explains her work commitments during the upcoming Lunar New Year period. The speech rate is moderate and well-articulated. (3) The audio concludes with a series of rhythmic traditional Chinese New Year greetings. The speaker's arousal increases, delivering well-wishes like 'Happy New Year' and 'Gong Xi Fa Cai' with higher intensity and a more dynamic pitch contour. The recording remains studio-clean with no post-production effects added.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a warm, personal message from a woman named Shufen to her boyfriend's parents. She introduces herself politely, apologizes for not being able to visit during the Lunar New Year due to work, and offers traditional festive blessings. The combination of high-arousal vocal delivery and sincere facial expressions aims to leave a positive first impression on the family.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Personal message format without product placement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A straightforward, high-quality selfie video utilizing traditional attire to enhance the festive theme of the message.
